title: Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions:
Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions!
